# Prompt Control Plane

> Deterministic prompt governance for production LLM systems.

Prompt Control Plane is a governance engine that enforces structure on every prompt before it reaches a model. It scores risk, enforces policies, compiles structured prompts, and logs every action to a hash-chained audit trail. Zero LLM calls run inside the engine. Fully deterministic, offline-first, reproducible.

## Key Facts
- 20 MCP tools for prompt governance
- Policy enforcement with advisory and enforce modes
- Risk scoring across hallucination, ambiguity, scope expansion, and constraint conflict
- Deterministic cross-provider routing (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Gemini, Perplexity)
- Hash-chained hash-chained audit trail
- Config lock with passphrase protection
- Custom rules with regex patterns and risk dimensions
- Ships as MCP server, CLI linter (prompt-lint), and GitHub Action
- Works with any codebase (Python, Java, Go, Rust, etc.)
- Four tiers: Free, Pro, Power, Enterprise

## Install
npm: claude-prompt-optimizer-mcp
GitHub: https://github.com/rishiatlan/Prompt-Optimizer-MCP
GitHub Action: https://github.com/marketplace/actions/prompt-lint
